Block.Para: An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Sackville â Eastern Shore

This bill was introduced during the First Session of the 40th Parliament. Pursuant to the Standing Orders of the House of Commons, it is deemed to have been considered and approved at all stages completed at the time of prorogation of the First Session. The number of the bill remains unchanged.

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment changes the name of the electoral district of Sackville â Eastern Shore to âSackville â Preston â Eastern Shoreâ.
An Act to change the name of the electoral district of Sackville â Eastern Shore
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Block.MarginalNote: Name changed to âSackville âPreston â Eastern Shoreâ
Block.Para: 1. In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of August 25, 2003, under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act, paragraph 8 of that part relating to the Province of Nova Scotia is amended by substituting the name âSackville â Preston â Eastern Shoreâ for the name âSackville âEastern Shoreâ.

Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
